Side Rants:

Iirc, this was the request that mentioned how AnyPOV feels fem-coded most time and I'm sorry to everyone if I've been doing that. I'm a woman and I have female anatomy so I think in terms of that automatically, meaning I probably don't realize if I'm making things fem-coded. I also tend to lean toward sub!User because...That's just me lmao. When I write, I usually put myself in User's place so it's more immersive (or I try to), so it ends up being me-coded by accident sdkflsj. It's also probably why I won't be doing so many requests anymore, I'm tired of forcing myself to do requests that I either don't want to OR don't have any inspiration/ideas for sjdklfsj

ALSO: I'm kind of tired of RDR, but at the same time that's all people like, so I'm kind of stuck doing it ūü•≤. I have a million fandoms in my list, but it's always a cowboy smh. Ppl probably followed me for them, so I HAVE to do them and it's like urgh...I'm going thru a crisis lmfao. If I get rid of every RDR request I get, then I'd have absolutely zero requests. I also feel guilty for not doing them all raaa!!! Sorry for this rant, it's been building up despite me already having ranted about it to others lmao. It's just hard bc on one hand I WANT to do rdr (and make people happy) but at the same time I'm scared I'll lose my love for the game if I do too much of it
